text:
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang forwarded a bibliography on Latter Rain from David Kling.
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang forwarded a message from Alison Kling about Erin's show.
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang replied in a family thread about a paint party, confirming attendance with playful tone.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports website bugs including broken Van Gogh button, navigation issues, and wordy homepage content.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests changing 'human' to 'our' in a specific line of text.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch suggests changing popups to hyperlinks to new pages if popups cannot be edited.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves the 'what' page format and requests navigation bar and layout changes.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the VG page inside performances and adjusting the CG logo color.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports that popup circles on the first page display outside the view screen.
- [scheduling] reminders@drchrono.com: Appointment reminder for Monty Owens on June 22, 2026 at 10:30 AM PDT.
- [follow up] Michael Lang: Self-generated summary of people awaiting replies from Mister Lang.
